'''Energy farms''' were structures in use by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] that harvested energy and dispensed it to power droid factories and to create [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].<ref name="TCW game" />

During the [[Battle of Thule]], energy farms powered the defenses protecting the Separatist [[Command Installation]]. [[Clone engineer]]s were deployed inside to leave them vulnerable to attack.<ref name="TCW game" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]
